purpose: negative evidence for attempted Count-to-three parity fixes
finding: CAMELID_ROPE_PAIRING=split_half flips Count to three. to llama.cpp output, but it badly regresses several previously passing prompts. A decode-only split-half experiment also regresses the suite. Therefore split-half RoPE is not a valid Mixtral/MoE default fix; the remaining blocker is narrower than a global RoPE-pairing switch.
support_boundary: no support promotion from this bundle; keep bounded runtime evidence and known divergence until a non-regressing fix is proven
